open_issue.problem: WormBot fixed code not landing in debug tab canvas
symptoms: Tool fires (TOOL block appears in chat bubble indicating model wrote it)
→ Sent to canvas sometimes shows, sometimes not
root_cause_candidates: A: _handle_tool_calls intercepts TOOL block but display_response still contains it — model shows it in chat before intercept fires
B: [DEBUG:WormBot: code] pattern match failing on the actual WormBot output string
C: push_debug_from_ethica fires but _debug_view is None at time of _do_write
D: wormbot.py _format_result [DEBUG:] block being stripped by re.sub before canvas gets it
open_issue.next_diagnostic: Add print() trace in _handle_canvas_push to confirm [DEBUG:] pattern is present in the string being checked, and confirm _debug_view is not None at write time
